title: frasera albicaulis var. cusickii
intro: Frasera albicaulis var. cusickii, also known as the Cusick's sage or green gentian, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Frasera albicaulis var. cusickii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and fever. Frasera albicaulis var. cusickii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
